name: Ganyuan Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Ganyuan Foods Co., Ltd engages in the research and development, production, and sale of legumes and nuts. The principal products include traditional roasted seeds and nuts, such as broad beans, melon seeds, green beans, peanuts, fried rice and beans, and nut products represented by cashew nuts and macadamia nuts. Ganyuan Foods Co., Ltd was founded in 2006 and is based in Pingxiang, China.
